title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
The Baron informs Anthony McGrath that restoration efforts have resumed following the death of Nicholas IV and that they support Prince Michael's ascension to the throne, a position backed by the British government. The Baron warns Anthony that his presence is problematic because the memoirs of the late Count Stapleton contain secrets that could cause European chaos and spread gossip regarding the Paulvich family. The Baron reveals that a weekly newspaper is prepared to publish the memoirs immediately upon their arrival. Despite the Baron offering Anthony increasing sums of money—reaching two thousand pounds—to abandon his task, Anthony refuses, citing his honor and his commitment to the assignment.

Following the Baron's departure, Anthony searches for a woman named Rueff. He discovers in a magazine that Mrs. Timothy Rue is actually Miss Virginia Gaussland, formerly Miss Rue. As Anthony prepares a package of letters, a menacing stranger enters his room and demands Stapleton's memoirs. The man identifies himself as a member of the Red Hand Party, presenting a paper marked with a red hand symbol. When Anthony refuses to hand over the manuscript, the stranger threatens to shoot him. Anthony reacts by stepping forward and knocking the gun out of the man's hand.
